84: ### Files to Create
85: 
86: #### 1. `cmd/agentd/main.go`
87: ```go
88: package main
89: 
90: import (
91:     "os"
92:     "sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/client/config"
93:     "sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/manager"
94:     "sigs.k8s.io/agent-sandbox/api/v1alpha1"
95:     "github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/idlecleanup"
96: )
97: 
98: func main() {
99:     mgr, _ := manager.New(config.GetConfigOrDie(), manager.Options{
100:         Scheme: scheme,
101:         Metrics: server.Options{BindAddress: "0"},
102:         HealthProbeBindAddress: "0",
103:     })
104:     mgr.Add(idlecleanup.NewReconciler(mgr.GetClient()))
105:     mgr.Start(ctrl.SetupSignalHandler())
106: }
107: ```
108: 
109: #### 2. `pkg/idlecleanup/reconciler.go`
110: ```go
111: type Reconciler struct {
112:     client client.Client
113:     log    logr.Logger
114: }
115: 
116: const SessionExpirationTimeout = 15 * time.Minute
117: const LastActivityAnnotationKey = "last-activity-time"
118: 
119: func (r *Reconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req ctrl.Request) (ctrl.Result, error) {
120:     // 1. Get Sandbox object
121:     // 2. Read last-activity-time annotation
122:     // 3. Parse RFC3339 timestamp
123:     // 4. Check if expired (now > lastActivity + 15min)
124:     // 5. Delete if expired, requeue if not yet expired
125: }
126: ```
127: 
128: #### 3. `pkg/idlecleanup/types.go`
129: ```go
130: type Config struct {
131:     ExpirationTimeout time.Duration
132:     RequeueInterval   time.Duration
133: }
134: ```
135: 
136: ### Logic Flow
137: 1. Watch Sandbox CRD changes
138: 2. Extract `last-activity-time` annotation
139: 3. Calculate expiration time (lastActivity + 15min)
140: 4. If expired: delete sandbox, return success
141: 5. If not expired: requeue until expiration
142: 6. Handle NotFound gracefully (idempotent delete)

1097: ## AR-035: Redis Provider Implementation
1098: 
1099: **Source:** `specs/session-store/spec.md` - Requirements 2-14
1100: 
1101: ### Package
1102: `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/store`
1103: 
1104: ### Files to Create
1105: 
1106: #### 1. `pkg/store/redis.go`
1107: 
1108: ```go
1109: package store
1110: 
1111: import (
1112:     "context"
1113:     "encoding/json"
1114:     "fmt"
1115:     "time"
1116: 
1117:     "github.com/redis/go-redis/v9"
1118:     "github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types"
1119: )
1120: 
1121: const (
1122:     sessionKeyPrefix    = "session:"
1123:     expirySortedSet     = "session:expiry"
1124:     lastActivitySortedSet = "session:last_activity"
1125: )
1126: 
1127: type RedisStore struct {
1128:     client *redis.Client
1129: }
1130: 
1131: func NewRedisStore(addr, password string, passwordRequired bool) (*RedisStore, error) {
1132:     if passwordRequired && password == "" {
1133:         return nil, fmt.Errorf("REDIS_PASSWORD is required")
1134:     }
1135:     
1136:     client := redis.NewClient(&redis.Options{
1137:         Addr:     addr,
1138:         Password: password,
1139:     })
1140:     
1141:     return &RedisStore{client: client}, nil
1142: }
1143: 
1144: func (r *RedisStore) Ping(ctx context.Context) error {
1145:     result, err := r.client.Ping(ctx).Result()
1146:     if err != nil {
1147:         return err
1148:     }
1149:     if result != "PONG" {
1150:         return fmt.Errorf("unexpected PING response: %s", result)
1151:     }
1152:     return nil
1153: }
1154: 
1155: func (r *RedisStore) GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
1156:     key := sessionKeyPrefix + sessionID
1157:     data, err := r.client.Get(ctx, key).Bytes()
1158:     if err == redis.Nil {
1159:         return nil, ErrNotFound
1160:     }
1161:     if err != nil {
1162:         return nil, err
1163:     }
1164:     
1165:     var info types.SandboxInfo
1166:     if err := json.Unmarshal(data, &info); err != nil {
1167:         return nil, err
1168:     }
1169:     return &info, nil
1170: }
1171: 
1172: func (r *RedisStore) StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, info *types.SandboxInfo) error {
1173:     if info == nil || info.ExpiresAt.IsZero() {
1174:         return fmt.Errorf("sandbox is nil or ExpiresAt is zero")
1175:     }
1176:     
1177:     key := sessionKeyPrefix + info.SessionID
1178:     data, err := json.Marshal(info)
1179:     if err != nil {
1180:         return err
1181:     }
1182:     
1183:     now := time.Now()
1184:     expiryScore := float64(info.ExpiresAt.Unix())
1185:     activityScore := float64(now.Unix())
1186:     
1187:     _, err = r.client.TxPipelined(ctx, func(pipe redis.Pipeliner) error {
1188:         pipe.SetNX(ctx, key, data, time.Until(info.ExpiresAt))
1189:         pipe.ZAdd(ctx, expirySortedSet, redis.Z{Score: expiryScore, Member: info.SessionID})
1190:         pipe.ZAdd(ctx, lastActivitySortedSet, redis.Z{Score: activityScore, Member: info.SessionID})
1191:         return nil
1192:     })
1193:     return err
1194: }
1195: 
1196: func (r *RedisStore) UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, info *types.SandboxInfo) error {
1197:     key := sessionKeyPrefix + info.SessionID
1198:     data, err := json.Marshal(info)
1199:     if err != nil {
1200:         return err
1201:     }
1202:     
1203:     ok, err := r.client.SetXX(ctx, key, data, 0).Result()
1204:     if err != nil {
1205:         return err
1206:     }
1207:     if !ok {
1208:         return fmt.Errorf("key not exists")
1209:     }
1210:     return nil
1211: }
1212: 
1213: func (r *RedisStore) DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error {
1214:     key := sessionKeyPrefix + sessionID
1215:     
1216:     _, err := r.client.TxPipelined(ctx, func(pipe redis.Pipeliner) error {
1217:         pipe.Del(ctx, key)
1218:         pipe.ZRem(ctx, expirySortedSet, sessionID)
1219:         pipe.ZRem(ctx, lastActivitySortedSet, sessionID)
1220:         return nil
1221:     })
1222:     return err
1223: }
1224: 
1225: func (r *RedisStore) ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int) ([]string, error) {
1226:     if limit <= 0 {
1227:         return nil, nil
1228:     }
1229:     
1230:     result, err := r.client.ZRangeByScore(ctx, expirySortedSet, &redis.ZRangeBy{
1231:         Min:    "-inf",
1232:         Max:    fmt.Sprintf("%d", before.Unix()),
1233:         Offset: 0,
1234:         Count:  int64(limit),
1235:     }).Result()
1236:     return result, err
1237: }
1238: 
1239: func (r *RedisStore) ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int) ([]string, error) {
1240:     if limit <= 0 {
1241:         return nil, nil
1242:     }
1243:     
1244:     result, err := r.client.ZRangeByScore(ctx, lastActivitySortedSet, &redis.ZRangeBy{
1245:         Min:    "-inf",
1246:         Max:    fmt.Sprintf("%d", before.Unix()),
1247:         Offset: 0,
1248:         Count:  int64(limit),
1249:     }).Result()
1250:     return result, err
1251: }
1252: 
1253: func (r *RedisStore) UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error {
1254:     if sessionID == "" {
1255:         return fmt.Errorf("session id is empty")
1256:     }
1257:     
1258:     if at.IsZero() {
1259:         at = time.Now()
1260:     }
1261:     
1262:     key := sessionKeyPrefix + sessionID
1263:     exists, err := r.client.Exists(ctx, key).Result()
1264:     if err != nil {
1265:         return err
1266:     }
1267:     if exists == 0 {
1268:         return ErrNotFound
1269:     }
1270:     
1271:     score := float64(at.Unix())
1272:     return r.client.ZAdd(ctx, lastActivitySortedSet, redis.Z{Score: score, Member: sessionID}).Err()
1273: }
1274: 
1275: func (r *RedisStore) Close() error {
1276:     return r.client.Close()
1277: }
1278: ```
1279: 
1280: #### 2. `pkg/store/redis_test.go`
1281: 
1282: Unit tests covering all Redis store methods with mock Redis or testcontainers.
1283: 
1284: ### Logic Flow
1285: 1. Connect to Redis using REDIS_ADDR and REDIS_PASSWORD
1286: 2. Implement all Store interface methods
1287: 3. Use Redis transactions (TxPipelined) for atomic operations
1288: 4. Maintain two sorted sets: expiry and last_activity
1289: 5. Return ErrNotFound on missing keys
1290: 6. Handle password requirement based on REDIS_PASSWORD_REQUIRED

# AgentCube Implementation Plan (AR-023 to AR-033)

## Overview

This plan maps Architectural Requirements AR-023 through AR-033 to specific files and implementation logic. These ARs represent extensions including CI/CD enhancements, idle cleanup controller, Python SDK, integrations, and platform enhancements.

---

## AR Mapping

| AR | Proposed Extension | Description |
|----|---------------------|--------------|
| AR-023 | CI/CD Enhancements | Extended GitHub Actions workflows, artifact management |
| AR-024 | Idle Cleanup (Agentd) | Controller for automatic sandbox cleanup on idle |
| AR-025 | Session Store Enhancements | Advanced session management, TTL, persistence |
| AR-026 | Sandbox Orchestration Extensions | Warm pools, templates, scaling policies |
| AR-027 | Session Routing Extensions | Advanced routing, load balancing, failover |
| AR-028 | Python SDK | Complete client library for Code Interpreter and AgentRuntime |
| AR-029 | Integration APIs | Dify plugin, PCAP analyzer, external integrations |
| AR-030 | Deployment Extensions | Helm chart enhancements, multi-environment support |

2120: func (j *JWTManager) TryStoreOrLoadJWTKeySecret(ctx context.Context) error {
2121:     if j.clientset == nil {
2122:         config, err := rest.InClusterConfig()
2123:         if err != nil {

2125:             return nil
2126:         }

2131:             return nil
2132:         }
2133:         j.clientset = clientset
2134:     }
2135:     
2136:     if ns := getAgentCubeNamespace(); ns != "" {
2137:         IdentityNamespace = ns
2138:     }
2139:     
2140:     secret := &v1.Secret{
2141:         ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{
2142:             Name:      IdentitySecretName,

2144:             Labels: map[string]string{
2145:                 "app":      "agentcube",
2146:                 "component": "router",
2147:             },
2148:         },
2149:         Type: v1.SecretTypeOpaque,
2150:         Data: map[string][]byte{
2151:             PrivateKeyDataKey: encodePrivateKey(j.privateKey),
2152:             PublicKeyDataKey:  encodePublicKey(j.publicKey),
2153:         },
2154:     }
2155:     
2156:     _, err := j.clientset.CoreV1().Secrets(IdentityNamespace).Create(ctx, secret, metav1.CreateOptions{})
2157:     if err == nil {

2159:         return nil

2165:

2167:     if err != nil {
2168:         return fmt.Errorf("failed to get existing secret: %w", err)
2169:     }
2170:     
2171:     if privData, ok := existing.Data[PrivateKeyDataKey]; ok {
2172:         key, err := parsePrivateKey(privData)
2173:         if err != nil {
2174:             return fmt.Errorf("failed to parse private key: %w", err)
2175:         }
2176:         j.privateKey = key
2177:         j.publicKey = &key.PublicKey
2178:     }
2179:     
2180:     return nil
2181: }

2183: func getAgentCubeNamespace() string {

2531: #### 1. `pkg/controllers/idlecleanup/reconciler.go`
2532: 
2533: ```go
2534: package idlecleanup
2535: 
2536: import (
2537:     "context"
2538:     "time"
2539: 
2540:     "sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/client"
2541:     "sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/reconcile"
2542:     "sigs.k8s.io/agent-sandbox/api/v1alpha1"
2543:     "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors"
2544:     "k8s.io/klog/v2"
2545: )
2546: 
2547: const (
2548:     LastActivityAnnotationKey = "agentcube.volcano.sh/last-activity"
2549:     SessionExpirationTimeout = 15 * time.Minute
2550: )
2551: 
2552: type Reconciler struct {
2553:     client client.Client
2554: }
2555: 
2556: func NewReconciler(c client.Client) *Reconciler {
2557:     return &Reconciler{client: c}
2558: }
2559: 
2560: func (r *Reconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req reconcile.Request) (reconcile.Result, error) {
2561:     sandbox := &v1alpha1.Sandbox{}
2562:     err := r.client.Get(ctx, req.NamespacedName, sandbox)
2563:     if err != nil {
2564:         if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
2565:             return reconcile.Result{}, nil
2566:         }
2567:         return reconcile.Result{}, err
2568:     }
2569:     
2570:     lastActivityStr, ok := sandbox.Annotations[LastActivityAnnotationKey]
2571:     if !ok || lastActivityStr == "" {
2572:         klog.Infof("Sandbox %s has no last-activity annotation, skipping", req.Name)
2573:         return reconcile.Result{}, nil
2574:     }
2575:     
2576:     lastActivity, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, lastActivityStr)
2577:     if err != nil {
2578:         klog.Errorf("Failed to parse last-activity for sandbox %s: %v", req.Name, err)
2579:         return reconcile.Result{RequeueAfter: 30 * time.Second}, err
2580:     }
2581:     
2582:     expirationTime := lastActivity.Add(SessionExpirationTimeout)
2583:     
2584:     if time.Now().After(expirationTime) {
2585:         klog.Infof("Sandbox %s has been idle for more than 15 minutes, deleting", req.Name)
2586:         
2587:         err = r.client.Delete(ctx, sandbox)
2588:         if err != nil {
2589:             if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
2590:                 klog.Infof("Sandbox %s already deleted", req.Name)
2591:                 return reconcile.Result{}, nil
2592:             }
2593:             klog.Errorf("Failed to delete sandbox %s: %v", req.Name, err)
2594:             return reconcile.Result{}, err
2595:         }
2596:         
2597:         klog.Infof("Sandbox %s deleted successfully", req.Name)
2598:         return reconcile.Result{}, nil
2599:     }
2600:     
2601:     requeueAfter := time.Until(expirationTime)
2602:     klog.Infof("Sandbox %s will expire in %v, requeueing", req.Name, requeueAfter)
2603:     return reconcile.Result{RequeueAfter: requeueAfter}, nil
2604: }
2605: ```
2606: 
2607: ### Logic Flow
2608: 1. Register reconciler for Sandbox CRD (agents.x-k8s.io/v1alpha1)
2609: 2. Read `agentcube.volcano.sh/last-activity` annotation
2610: 3. Skip if annotation missing or empty
2611: 4. Parse RFC3339 timestamp, requeue 30s on parse error
2612: 5. Calculate expiration (lastActivity + 15 minutes)
2613: 6. If expired: delete Sandbox CR
2614: 7. If not expired: requeue until expiration
2615: 8. Handle NotFound as success (idempotent)

14: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/controller"
15: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/event"

22: 
23: 	sandboxv1alpha1 "github.com/volcano-sh/agent-sandbox/api/v1alpha1"
24: )
25: 
26: const (
27: 	LastActivityAnnotationKey = "last-activity-time"
28: 	SessionExpirationTimeout  = 15 * time.Minute
29: )
30: 
31: var (
32: 	log_ = log.Log.WithName("idlecleanup")
33: )
34: 
35: type Reconciler struct {
36: 	kubeClient        kubernetes.Interface
37: 	client            client.Client
38: 	namespace         string
39: 	expirationTimeout time.Duration
40: 	syncInterval      time.Duration
41: }
42: 
43: func NewReconciler(kubeClient kubernetes.Interface, namespace string, expirationTimeout, syncInterval time.Duration) *Reconciler {
44: 	return &Reconciler{
45: 		kubeClient:        kubeClient,
46: 		namespace:         namespace,
47: 		expirationTimeout: expirationTimeout,
48: 		syncInterval:      syncInterval,
49: 	}
50: }
51: 
52: func (r *Reconciler) SetupWithManager(mgr manager.Manager) error {
53: 	r.client = mgr.GetClient()
54: 
55: 	_, err := controller.New("idlecleanup-controller", mgr, controller.Options{
56: 		Reconciler: r,
57: 	})
58: 	if err != nil {
59: 		return err
60: 	}
61: 
62: 	src := source.NewKindWithCache(&sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox{}, mgr.GetCache())
63: 	hdler := handler.EnqueueRequestsFromMapFunc(r.enqueueRequests)
64: 
65: 	pred := predicate.Funcs{
66: 		CreateFunc:  func(e event.CreateEvent) bool { return true },
67: 		DeleteFunc:  func(e event.DeleteEvent) bool { return true },
68: 		UpdateFunc:  func(e event.UpdateEvent) bool { return true },
69: 		GenericFunc: func(e event.GenericEvent) bool { return true },
70: 	}
71: 
72: 	if err := mgr.GetCache().IndexField(context.Background(), &sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox{}, ".spec.state", r.indexStateField); err != nil {
73: 		return err
74: 	}
75: 
76: 	return mgr.Add(controller.New("idlecleanup-controller", mgr, controller.Options{
77: 		Reconciler: r,
78: 	}))
79: }
80: 
81: func (r *Reconciler) indexStateField(o client.Object) []string {
82: 	sb := o.(*sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox)
83: 	return []string{sb.Spec.State}
84: }
85: 
86: func (r *Reconciler) enqueueRequests(_ context.Context, o handler.MapObject) []reconcile.Request {
87: 	return []reconcile.Request{
88: 		{
89: 			NamespacedName: client.ObjectKeyFromObject(o.Object),
90: 		},
91: 	}
92: }
93: 
94: func (r *Reconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req reconcile.Request) (reconcile.Result, error) {
95: 	startTime := time.Now()
96: 	defer func() {
97: 		duration := time.Since(startTime)
98: 		klog.V(4).Infof("Reconciliation completed in %v", duration)
99: 	}()
100: 
101: 	namespace := req.Namespace
102: 	if r.namespace != "" {
103: 		namespace = r.namespace
104: 	}
105: 
106: 	sandbox := &sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox{}
107: 	err := r.client.Get(ctx, req.NamespacedName, sandbox)
108: 	if err != nil {
109: 		if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
110: 			klog.V(4).Infof("Sandbox %s not found, skipping", req.NamespacedName)
111: 			return reconcile.Result{}, nil
112: 		}
113: 		klog.Errorf("Failed to get Sandbox %s: %v", req.NamespacedName, err)
114: 		return reconcile.Result{}, err
115: 	}
116: 
117: 	lastActivityStr, ok := sandbox.Annotations[LastActivityAnnotationKey]
118: 	if !ok {
119: 		klog.V(4).Infof("Sandbox %s has no last-activity-time annotation, skipping", req.NamespacedName)
120: 		return reconcile.Result{RequeueAfter: r.syncInterval}, nil
121: 	}
122: 
123: 	lastActivity, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, lastActivityStr)
124: 	if err != nil {
125: 		klog.Errorf("Failed to parse last-activity-time for Sandbox %s: %v", req.NamespacedName, err)
126: 		return reconcile.Result{RequeueAfter: r.syncInterval}, nil
127: 	}
128: 
129: 	expirationTime := lastActivity.Add(r.expirationTimeout)
130: 	now := time.Now()
131: 
132: 	if now.After(expirationTime) {
133: 		klog.Infof("Deleting expired Sandbox %s (last activity: %v, expiration: %v)",
134: 			req.NamespacedName, lastActivity, expirationTime)
135: 
136: 		policy := client.DeletePropagationForeground
137: 		if err := r.client.Delete(ctx, sandbox, &client.DeleteOptions{PropagationPolicy: &policy}); err != nil {
138: 			if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
139: 				klog.V(4).Infof("Sandbox %s already deleted", req.NamespacedName)
140: 				return reconcile.Result{}, nil
141: 			}
142: 			klog.Errorf("Failed to delete Sandbox %s: %v", req.NamespacedName, err)
143: 			return reconcile.Result{}, err
144: 		}
145: 
146: 		klog.Infof("Successfully deleted expired Sandbox %s", req.NamespacedName)
147: 		return reconcile.Result{}, nil
148: 	}
149: 
150: 	requeueTime := expirationTime.Sub(now)
151: 	if requeueTime < time.Second {
152: 		requeueTime = time.Second
153: 	}
154: 
155: 	klog.V(4).Infof("Sandbox %s not yet expired (expires in %v)", req.NamespacedName, requeueTime)
156: 	return reconcile.Result{RequeueAfter: requeueTime}, nil
157: }
158: 
159: func (r *Reconciler) ReconcileExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context) error {
160: 	namespace := r.namespace
161: 	if namespace == "" {
162: 		namespace = metav1.NamespaceAll
163: 	}
164: 
165: 	listOpts := &client.ListOptions{
166: 		Namespace:     namespace,
167: 		LabelSelector: labels.Everything(),
168: 	}
169: 
170: 	sandboxList := &sandboxv1alpha1.SandboxList{}
171: 	if err := r.client.List(ctx, sandboxList, listOpts); err != nil {
172: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to list sandboxes: %w", err)
173: 	}
174: 
175: 	now := time.Now()
176: 	deletedCount := 0
177: 
178: 	for i := range sandboxList.Items {
179: 		sb := &sandboxList.Items[i]
180: 
181: 		lastActivityStr, ok := sb.Annotations[LastActivityAnnotationKey]
182: 		if !ok {
183: 			continue
184: 		}
185: 
186: 		lastActivity, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, lastActivityStr)
187: 		if err != nil {
188: 			continue
189: 		}
190: 
191: 		expirationTime := lastActivity.Add(r.expirationTimeout)
192: 		if now.After(expirationTime) {
193: 			klog.Infof("Cleaning up expired sandbox %s/%s", sb.Namespace, sb.Name)
194: 
195: 			policy := client.DeletePropagationForeground
196: 			if err := r.client.Delete(ctx, sb, &client.DeleteOptions{PropagationPolicy: &policy}); err != nil {
197: 				if !errors.IsNotFound(err) {
198: 					klog.Errorf("Failed to delete sandbox %s/%s: %v", sb.Namespace, sb.Name, err)
199: 				}
200: 				continue
201: 			}
202: 			deletedCount++
203: 		}
204: 	}
205: 
206: 	klog.V(2).Infof("Cleaned up %d expired sandboxes in namespace %s", deletedCount, namespace)
207: 	return nil
208: }
